calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Confirm Successor Trustee And Trust Assets Of Patrcia Bowler Revocable Trust, Exhibits A Through F
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Farley for Robert Bowler.

Ms. Farley stated that the minor has received notice, that she lives with the father and that she goes through the paper work. Ms. Farley also addressed venue stating that all the trust has is the house in San Francisco. The Court granted the Petition for Order to Confirm Successor Trustee, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy K. Saephan. (Not Reported)
